name: Annie

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Pyromania
passive.description_source: Innate:  Annie's spell-casts generate stacks. At maximum stacks, her next offensive spell will consume them to  stun the target.

effects.description: Innate - Pyromania: Annie generates a stack of Pyromania whenever she hits an enemy with Disintegrate or casts her other abilities, stacking up to 4 times, at which she gains Energized.
Energized: Annie empowers her next cast of Disintegrate, Incinerate, or Summon: Tibbers to consume all Pyromania stacks to stun enemies hit for 1.25 / 1.5 / 1.75 (based on level) seconds.
Annie gains maximum stacks of Pyromania when the game starts and upon respawning. She will lose Energized and all Pyromania stacks upon death.

passive.description: Innate - Pyromania: Annie generates a stack of Pyromania whenever she hits an enemy with Disintegrate or casts her other abilities, stacking up to 4 times, at which she gains Energized.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Annie does not lose any stacks upon entering or exiting resurrection.

basic_ability_1.name: Disintegrate
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Annie hurls a fireball at the target enemy that deals magic damage.

effects.context_notes: Active: Annie hurls a fireball at the target enemy that deals magic damage.

effects.description: If this kills the target, Disintegrate's cooldown is reduced by 50% and its mana cost is refunded.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Annie hurls a fireball at the target enemy that deals magic damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Disintegrate will also grant the cooldown reduction and mana cost refund if the target is dead upon the missile's arrival.

basic_ability_2.name: Incinerate
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Annie casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Annie releases fire in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Annie releases fire in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Incinerate can hit targets behind Annie, provided their radius intersects with the cone hitbox.

basic_ability_3.name: Molten Shield
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Annie grants herself or an allied champion—and  Tibbers—a  shield with a burst of  move speed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Annie grants herself or the target allied champion and Tibbers a shield for 3 seconds and 20% : 53.
While Molten Shield is active, enemies that deal damage to it take magic damage.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Annie grants herself or the target allied champion and Tibbers a shield for 3 seconds and 20% : 53.53% (based on level) bonus movement speed that decays over 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Molten Shield casts on ally if targeted or if very close to targeting them (within a range of 225); otherwise self casts.

ultimate.name: Summon: Tibbers
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Annie summons her bear  Tibbers, dealing magic damage to enemies in the area.

effects.context_notes: Active: Annie summons Tibbers to the target location in a burst of flame, dealing magic damage to enemies near him.

effects.description: Tibbers then remains on the field as a controllable pet for up to 45 seconds.
Recast: Annie directs Tibbers to the target location.
Summon: Tibbers' recast can be used while affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control. See Pets for more details about Tibbers.

context_notes: Source notes (summary): Only the initial cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade.

Manual verification (2026-02-24): Summon: Tibbers has a 0.25-second cast windup with immediate area impact on summon, then persists as a controllable pet for up to 45 seconds; recast only re-issues Tibbers movement and does not repeat the summon burst.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Summon: Tibbers execution timing, activation gating, and player-visible resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
